title: Gymnosciadium pusillum
taxonomy: Gymnosciadium pusillum is a species within the family Apiaceae, commonly known as the carrot or parsley family. It belongs to the genus Gymnosciadium and is classified as a type of flowering plant. The plant is further classified as a perennial herb, with a specific classification of Gymnosciadium pusillum in the kingdom Plantae. This classification places it among other flowering plants. Gymnosciadium pusillum's classification is also recognized in botanical literature as a part of the family Apiaceae.
uses: Gymnosciadium pusillum is a plant that has been studied for its potential medicinal properties, particularly in traditional medicine. properties: Gymnosciadium pusillum, also known as small hemlock-parsley, is a plant with various therapeutic properties.
